What is EATO?

EATO is a discovery platform helping people explore African food, culture and lifestyle.

From restaurants, chefs and recipes to cultural events, travel experiences and emerging brands, we connect people with the stories, businesses and experiences shaping modern Africa.

As we grow, EATO will become a marketplace where you can shop directly from African businesses and brands.

TFor now, become an EATO Member and receive exclusive recommendations straight to your inbox.

Margaret Kyerematen-Debrah
Co-Founder, EATO

Membership

Become an
EATO Member

Join our community and be the first to discover the people, places and experiences shaping modern Africa.

  • Restaurant recommendations from across Africa and the diaspora.
  • New recipes and food discoveries, delivered regularly.
  • Cultural event updates and travel inspiration.
  • Exclusive discounts with EATO partners.
  • First access to competitions, including our Ghana holiday giveaway.
  • Community news and platform updates.
